metadata.inventory_policy: Executable consumers, old runners, result JSON/report artifacts, and historical plan families are represented as lanes. Archival mentions are bucketed so broad grep output does not turn every historical note into an executable rerun lane.
metadata.old_evidence_policy: Old LEDH-PFPF-OT and dpf_ledh_pfpf_ot artifacts define historical coverage only and cannot be cited as current Algorithm 1 evidence.

default_threshold_policy.threshold_source: P0 registry row or P2 frozen contract row before numerical execution

non_claims: Does not establish broad numerical performance.
guardrail_test.primary_promote_statistic: pytest pass/fail only; no numerical promotion
veto_diagnostics: pytest failure
old route accepted as Algorithm 1 route
old implementation imported by Algorithm 1 module

registry_rows.value_tolerance: P1 must predeclare before run using Kalman scale and MC uncertainty
non_claims: No production default.
No gradient claim from value row.
registry_rows.primary_promote_statistic: predeclared value error statistic against comparator; finite-only is diagnostic

core Algorithm 1 row mixed with BayesFilter extension row

unsupported comparator or target-route pair promoted

artifact_groups.notes: Historical plan/result family defines old coverage, not current Algorithm 1 evidence.
Covered by V2 contract/value/gradient replacement lanes.
Any executable consumer or artifact with dpf_ledh_pfpf_ot is superseded for Algorithm 1 evidence; P0-P4 old consumers are explicitly represented as historical consumers.

paths_or_globs: older broad docs/plans artifacts containing LEDH-PFPF-OT terms
artifact_groups.notes: Not executable lanes. P0 result must keep these separate from active runners/gates.

p0_inventory_commands: rg --files tests experiments/dpf_implementation/tf_tfp/runners experiments/dpf_implementation/reports experiments/dpf_implementation/reports/outputs docs/plans scripts | rg -i "ledh.*pfpf|pfpf.*ledh|dpf_v2_ledh|filterflow_matched_ledh|source_faithful_repair|filter_oracle_comparison_p[5678]|filter-oracle-comparison-p[5678]|dpf_v2_algorithm_full_comparison_live_gate|run_v2_algorithm_full_comparison_closeout|run_filter_oracle_comparison_p1"

p0_guardrail_test_result.cpu_gpu_status: CPU-only TensorFlow run; CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES=-1 set before import
